security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' asset: http://asset.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost https:; font-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* https: wss:; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'

bundle.longDescription: SP42 is a Rust-first Wikipedia patrolling workbench with a bundled desktop shell.
